raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "typename must be a string",
    "field_names must be a string or an iterable of strings",
    "rename must be a boolean",
    "defaults must be None or an iterable",
    "module must be None or a string"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns a new subclass of tuple",
    "the returned subclass has named fields",
    "the returned subclass has the specified typename"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "field_names is an empty string or an empty iterable",
    "field_names contains duplicate field names and rename is False",
    "defaults is provided but its length does not match the number of fields without default values",
    "typename is an empty string"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "typename must be a non-empty string",
    "field_names must be a list of non-empty strings",
    "rename must be a boolean",
    "defaults must be a list of values or None",
    "module must be a string or None"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns a new subclass of tuple with named fields",
    "new subclass has the same fields as field_names",
    "new subclass has the same defaults as defaults"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if rename is True, raises TypeError",
    "if defaults is not None and len(defaults) != len(field_names), raises ValueError",
    "if module is not None and not isinstance(module, str), raises TypeError"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.hf:
{
  "preconditions": [
    "typename must be a non-empty string",
    "field_names must be a non-empty list of non-empty strings",
    "rename must be a boolean",
    "defaults must be a list of values or None",
    "module must be a string or None"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns a new subclass of tuple with named fields",
    "the subclass has the same fields as the field_names list",
    "the subclass has the same default values as the defaults list"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if field_names is empty, returns a tuple subclass with no fields",
    "if rename is True, renames the fields to lowercase",
    "if defaults is None, uses default values of None for all fields"
  ]
}
